1123.reason: [This line assumes there is at least one FuncDef before MainFuncDef, but the grammar allows zero FuncDefs. If funcDefs is empty, this will throw an IndexOutOfBoundsException or incorrectly treat a non-main function as main. The parser should explicitly parse MainFuncDef separately instead of assuming it's the last element in funcDefs.]
